title: THE 2PM CLUB Christmas Daytime Disco Milton Keynes
subtitle: The ULTIMATE Christmas Daytime Disco - Wall‑to‑wall 80s, 90s & 00s anthems with festive classics from Mariah, Wham! Slade & co.
description: Festive 2PM CLUB — daytime dancefloor, home in time for tree lights.
fullDescription:
Your Christmas Party just got upgraded... to the afternoon! No more yawning through midnight office do's. From 2PM sharp, we're upgrading your December with neon fairy lights, and wall‑shaking 80s, 90s & 00s anthems - spiked with the festive bangers you've been miming in the car since November.

Your best night out is NOW in the afternoon. By 7 PM, you'll be back on the sofa for Strictly, glowing like Rudolph with your voice happily gone. It's all the festive fun with your mates, none of the Sunday regret.
highlights: 🎄 Festive Floor‑Fillers: Mariah, Wham!, Slade, Shakin' Stevens - every Christmas banger you've been waiting all year to belt out. No ironic distance. No holding back. Just pure, unfiltered festive joy with a room full of people who get it.|🎤 Iconic Throwbacks: Wall-to-wall 80s, 90s & 00s anthems. Every chorus you still know by heart - even the ones you forgot you knew. Whitney to Oasis. Spice Girls to Bon Jovi. Four hours of songs that shaped your Saturday nights, now soundtracking your Saturday afternoon.|🕑 The 7pm Win: Full night-out energy - confetti, lights, the lot - but you're home before your takeaway gets cold. No 2am regrets. No lost Sunday. Just that post-party buzz while you're curled up on the sofa, still smiling.|👯‍♀️ Group‑Chat Hero: You know how group plans usually go: 47 messages, three "maybes," someone bails. Not this time. Afternoon timing means everyone can actually make it. One link, one plan - you just became the legend who sorted Christmas.

title: GET READY - 60s/70s Motown, Soul & Disco
subtitle: Sunday Matinee Special
description: Join us for a Sunday matinee special of GET READY featuring the BIGGEST hits of 60s/70s Motown, Soul and Disco! Come and banish the January blues with an afternoon of 1960s and 70s classics. Our DJs will play the biggest floorfillers of the era including The Jacksons, Al Wilson, Stevie Wonder, The Four Tops, Rick James, Chic, Sister Sledge, The Temptations, James Brown, Diana Ross, The Supremes, The Marvelettes, Martha Reeves and the Vandellas, Ray Charles and more. Tickets just £6 each until 24th Dec!

title: THE 2PM CLUB Luton
subtitle: Your best night out, right in the middle of the afternoon. 4 hours of 80s, 90s & 00s anthems. Home by 7-ish. Let your hair down. Properly!
description: THE 2PM CLUB Luton — 4 hours of iconic 80s, 90s & 00s anthems. All the fun of a proper night out, home by 7-ish.
fullDescription:
LET YOUR HAIR DOWN. PROPERLY

Remember when going OUT OUT didn't require a week's recovery? When you could sing every word, lose your voice, and still feel human the next day?

The 2PM Club is the night out that never gets cancelled. No more 47-message group chats. No more "maybe next time." Everyone says yes to this one.
highlights: 🎤 ICONIC ANTHEMS. NONSTOP ENERGY: Wall-to-wall 80s, 90s and 00s. Belting out lyrics with other people who know every word too. That moment when the whole room feels like family – that's what you're booking.|🕺 DAYTIME PARTY, NIGHT-OUT VIBES: Same Boombastic team, Club-level production and confetti moments – just at people-friendly hours. Dance freely, laugh loudly, and still be home by 7pm.|👯 THE 'NIGHT OUT' EVERYONE SAYS YES TO: No more 47-message threads. No more "maybe next time." Four hours where everyone actually makes it.|😎 NO SUNDAY REGRETS - JUST A GLOW: Perfect Sunday! You'll still be buzzing after a full night's sleep. A hoarse voice from belting out all the bangers is the only hangover we're talking about. Get all the buzz of a massive night out, but wake up fresh.|🏆 TRUST THE LEGACY: Created by Boombastic Events – 10+ years of consistent sell-outs across the UK because we know how to create moments that matter.

title: SILENT DISCO GREATEST HITS IS 10!
subtitle: 10th Anniversary Celebration
description:
Ten years of the most popular silent disco in the region! Join us for a very special celebration of a decade of legendary nights filled with friends, party tunes, and epic headphone moments.

3 DJs play 4 hours of the biggest hits!

🔵 POP – Taylor Swift, ABBA & Beyoncé 💃
🟢 INDIE – Arctic Monkeys, The Killers & Oasis 🎸
🔴 DANCE – Calvin Harris, Faithless & Robin S 🔊

Switch whenever you want – your headphones, your rules! 💬 Perfect for birthdays, reunions, or an unforgettable catch-up!
fullDescription:
Ten years of the most popular silent disco in the region!

Join us for a very special celebration of a decade of legendary nights filled with friends, party tunes, and epic headphone moments.

3 DJs play 4 hours of the biggest hits – pick your vibe or switch it up! Your choice!
highlights: 🎤 SING LIKE NOBODY'S LISTENING: Because they're not. They're too busy doing exactly the same thing. You'll be screaming Mr Brightside while your mate's lost in Show Me Love.|👯 THE NIGHT OUT WHERE EVERYONE WINS: No more arguing about music. No more splitting up to find different rooms. The pop fan, the indie kid, and the dance head - all on the same floor, all having the time of their lives. Switch whenever you want. Your headphones, your rules.|🤣 THE HEADPHONES-OFF MOMENT: Take them off for five seconds. Shuffling feet. Muffled singing. Someone shouting "THIS SONG!" before slamming their headphones back on. Three different songs happening at once. It's hilarious. It's brilliant.|🏆 TEN YEARS. STILL GOING STRONG: The most popular silent disco in the region for a decade. Created by Boombastic Events - the team behind 10+ years of sold-out events across the Midlands.

channels.name: POP THROWBACKS
channels.artists: Taylor Swift, ABBA, Beyoncé, Dua Lipa & more 💃
channels.description: Massive singalong anthems and feel-good party classics. The songs everyone knows every word to.

channels.name: INDIE CLASSICS
channels.artists: Arctic Monkeys, The Killers, Oasis, Blossoms & more 🎸
channels.description: Guitar-driven bangers and indie classics. For those who like their tunes with a bit more edge.

channels.name: DANCE ANTHEMS
channels.artists: Calvin Harris, Faithless, Robin S, Disclosure & more 🔊
channels.description: Pure dancefloor energy. House, dance and club classics to keep you moving all night.
